columns_filter.label: End Of Routine Failure Analysis Date
End Of Security Vul Support Date

custom_columns.label: Row Style
custom_columns.expr: "{'background-color':'#ef9a9a'}" if sys_uptime_days in[">180"] else "{'background-color':'#fff59d'}" if sys_uptime_days  in["150-180"] else "{'background-color':'#a5d6a7'}" if sys_uptime_days  in["<150"] else  "{'background-color':'#b0bec5'}"

custom_columns.label: Row Style
custom_columns.expr: "{'background-color':'#ef9a9a'}" if up_ports_categorization in["0", "0.0"] else "{'background-color':'#fff59d'}" if up_ports_categorization  in["1-5"] else "{'background-color':'#a5d6a7'}" if up_ports_categorization  in["6+"] else  "{'background-color':'#b0bec5'}"

custom_columns.label: Row Style
custom_columns.expr: "{'background-color':'#ef9a9a'}" if down_ports_categorization in["0-3"] else "{'background-color':'#fff59d'}" if down_ports_categorization  in["4-8"] else "{'background-color':'#a5d6a7'}" if down_ports_categorization  in["9+"] else  "{'background-color':'#b0bec5'}"

widgets.title: PoE Status by Available Watts
widgets.extra_filter: ((asset_object in 'Chassis') and (is_poe_capable in 'Yes') and (asset_type not in 'Software'))

widgets.title: PoE Enabled Deivces
widgets.extra_filter: (asset_object in 'Chassis') and (`is_poe_capable` in "Yes") and (`asset_object` not in "Software")

widgets.title: PoE Disabled Deivces
widgets.extra_filter: (asset_object in 'Chassis')  and (`is_poe_capable` in "No") and (`asset_object` not in "Software")

widgets.extra_filter: (asset_object in 'Chassis') and (`is_poe_capable` in "Yes") and (`asset_object` not in "Software")

custom_columns.label: Row Style
custom_columns.expr: "{'background-color':'#ef9a9a'}" if poe_watts_categorization in["<60"] else "{'background-color':'#fff59d'}" if poe_watts_categorization  in["60-100"] else "{'background-color':'#a5d6a7'}" if poe_watts_categorization  in[">100"] else  "{'background-color':'#b0bec5'}"
